title: How to price a high-ticket offer
summary: Anchor on outcome, not hours. Charge for the transformation.

tactics: Never quote an hourly rate first
quotes: Price is a story you tell about value
examples: For example, a $2k audit that saves $50k
business_applications: Apply: Always lead with the outcome
monetization_opportunities: Package the audit as a productized offer
action_items: Execute: Always lead with the outcome
Test for revenue: Package the audit as a productized offer
